findings.title: Possible SQL Injection in 'id'
findings.description: Parameter 'id' returned a database error when injected.
findings.evidence: Payload: ' | Matched: you have an error in your sql syntax
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries. Never concatenate user input into SQL.

findings.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: HSTS missing — vulnerable to SSL-stripping attacks.
